objective: Strictly review the V3.71 proxy-positive feature-horizon rows with redundancy clustering, extended negative controls, alternate-index proxy validation, and market-trend proxy diagnostics; output a higher-quality label-review queue only.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not use proxy labels as official total-return evidence.
Do not promote any feature into the default model.
Do not move V3.71 proxy-positive rows directly to a portfolio harness.
acceptance_criteria: V3.71 manifest must pass its own self checks.
Only V3.71 proxy-positive feature-horizon rows are reviewed.
Redundancy clustering must be written for all reviewed rows.
Extended negative controls must include at least three shifts.
Cross-index validation must include at least two alternate broad-index price proxies.
Market-trend proxy diagnostics must be written.
No output permits portfolio backtest, official total-return validation, or model promotion.
failure_conditions: Any output allows portfolio harness or model promotion.
Any official total-return evidence is claimed.
Any NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return output is produced.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: data_steward should acquire or validate a higher-quality official/total-return label source for strict survivors before any strategy harness is considered.
